scripts.build: pnpm --filter "./artifacts/trading-journal" --filter "./artifacts/api-server" --if-present run build && rm -rf out && mkdir -p out/api-dist out/api && cp -rv artifacts/trading-journal/dist/public/* out/ && cp -rv artifacts/api-server/dist/* out/api-dist/ && cp -rv api/* out/api/
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
